intelligence.target_persona: Busy dog owners in urban areas seeking reliable, caring exercise and companionship for their pets.

hero.headline: Give Your Dog the Exercise and Care They Deserve
hero.subtext: Professional & caring dog walking right at your doorstep

about.story_text: At Test3 Brand, we provide dedicated and trustworthy dog walking services tailored to busy pet owners. Our walkers are passionate and experienced, ensuring your dog gets the best care, exercise, and companionship.
about.founder_note: As a lifelong dog lover, I understand how important daily exercise and attention are for your furry friends. Our goal is to help your dog stay healthy and happy, even when your schedule gets busy.

items.label: Fully Insured

items.label: Pet-Centered Care
items.sublabel: We treat your dog like one of our own

features.title: Experienced Walkers
features.description: Our team consists of trained professionals who know how to handle dogs of all sizes and temperaments.

features.title: Personalized Walks
features.description: We customize walk lengths and routes to fit your dog's needs and preferences.

features.title: Flexible Scheduling
features.description: Book walkthrough our app or website anytime to fit your busy lifestyle.

features.title: Daily Updates
features.description: Receive photos and notes after each walk so you know your dog is happy and safe.
